name: Fish and Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Halibut, monkfish, bream or snapper steaks
or 1 Whole 2 lb. Fish, cleaned, scales left on,
scored several times on the sides
recipeInstructions:
Grilled Fish A La Marocaine
This picante, pungent Moroccan marinade can be used
for any fish suitable for grilling or broiling and can
also be used to marinate fish before baking. It's
good with firm, white fleshed fish.
1. Pound together the garlic, salt, cilantro, paprika,
cumin, and cayenne.
2. Stir in the lemon juice and olive oil.
3. Marinate fish steaks or whole fish in this mixture for several hours,
turning from time to time.
4. Grill the fish for 4 minutes per inch of thickness,
turning halfway through.
5. Baste with the marinade and serve at once, garnished with additional cilantro.
6. Chill leftovers and serve cold the next day.
